title: Can't access to ESXi host from mRemoteNG
author: m0hossa
body_snippet:
Hi

I am trying to add ESXi host to access in web using HTTPs but it does not do anything. The version I am using is 1.77.3 (Build 1784).

Any help would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks

iterations.description: Issue reports ESXi web console access failure but lacks reproducible steps, error logs, or confirmation on current build—maintainer already requested retest with no follow-up.

comments.author: Meph79
comments.snippet:
> what version of ESXi host?

I'm not the one reporting this problem but i have the same issue so does my collegues.. 
This is what i have tested:
Working fine with ESXi 7.0.3c
Does not work with ESXi 8.0.1 and 8.0.2

Im running mRemoteNG V 1.76.20.24615

I think it is not working since the new UI was introduced by Vmware... But not sure.. 
When loading the loginpage does not show up only a blank screen (with correct color background)

comments.author: simonai1254
comments.snippet: Has anyone tried another (random) webpage to be added into mremoteNG?

comments.author: Meph79
comments.snippet:
> Has anyone tried another (random) webpage to be added into mremoteNG?

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

**Commit:** `6c110776` (fork `robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`)
**What changed:** Can't access to ESXi host from mRemoteNG

A beta build (v1.81.0-beta.4) including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

notes:
AI triage (claude): Issue reports ESXi web console access failure but lacks reproducible steps, error logs, or confirmation on current build—maintainer already requested retest with no follow-up.
Approach: Wait for user to retest on latest build and provide steps/logs; likely related to WebBrowser control or Chromium rendering of ESXi web UI
